title: Operations Director (Food Distribution)
description:
about the company
Our client is a premier international distributor of high-end speciality ingredients, and we are looking for an Operations Director to oversee supply chain and operations functions, including procurement, warehouse and transportation. 

about the job

  • Direct the end-to-end life-cycle of the supply chain, from global procurement and customs compliance to localised warehousing, while collaborating with executive leadership to scale operational infrastructure in line with business growth.
  • Design and implement advanced workflows for inventory accuracy, warehouse layout optimisation, and transport routing to maximise service reliability while maintaining strict cost discipline.
  • Serve as the primary lead for high-level negotiations and relationship management with third-party logistics providers, freight forwarders, and equipment vendors to ensure favourable commercial terms and seamless service.
  • Establish rigorous quality management protocols and standard operating procedures (SOPs) to ensure full adherence to regulatory requirements and resolve complex customer service inquiries with a commitment to excellence.
  • Cultivate a high-performing culture by recruiting and coaching multi-disciplinary teams (Procurement, Warehouse, and Transport) and utilising KPI-driven insights to boost productivity and accountability.


skills and experience required

  • Min. 6 years of relevant experiences in supply chain/operations within the FMCG/Food industry.
  • Proven leadership experiences
  • Willing to take on hands-on responsibilities


To apply online please use the 'apply' function.
(EA: 94C3609/ R1985244)

postedCompany.description:
Randstad is a global talent leader with the vision to be the world’s most equitable and specialised talent company. As a partner for talent and through our four specialisations - Operational, Professional, Digital and Enterprise - we provide clients with the high-quality, diverse and agile workforces that they need to succeed in a talent scarce world. We help people secure meaningful roles, develop relevant skills and find purpose and belonging in their workplace. Through the value we create, we are committed to a better and more sustainable future for all.

In Singapore, we provide specialised professional recruitment and employer branding consultation services to companies in these industries and functions:

Accounting & Finance
Banking & Financial Services
Construction & Property
Corporate & Secretarial Support
Engineering
Human Resources
Information Technology
Legal
Life Science
Sales, Marketing and Communications
Supply Chain & Procurement

For more information, please visit www.randstad.com.sg.
postedCompany.name: RANDSTAD PTE. LIMITED

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
